description_long: This is a large, menacing sword with a broad, single-edged blade that features a pronounced curve and a series of cutouts along its spine, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. The blade is dark, likely made of blackened or coated metal, and has a sharp, pointed tip suitable for both slashing and thrusting. The handle is straight with a textured grip, possibly wrapped or made from a composite material, and ends in a metallic pommel with a small protruding guard. There is a secondary grip or support near the base of the blade, suggesting it is designed for two-handed use or for added control. The overall design is sleek and aggressive, with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and intimidation. This weapon would stand out in an urban environment, possibly as a display piece or for specialized use.
description: A large, curved, blackened sword with a cutout blade and a straight, textured handle featuring a small guard and pommel. The design is modern, tactical, and functional with minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade, cutouts, and the straight handle with a visible guard and pommel.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade's curve and cutouts, with the handle and guard visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite direction, again emphasizing the slim profile of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, textured, composite or wrapped grip, metallic pommel, small guard
